memoryArtifacts.headline: Cowthally Castle, Carnwath, Lanarkshire, Scotland
memoryArtifacts.description:
Cowthally Castle, view of a ruined overgrown castle with remnants of a round tower to the left, on a hill-top with a stream running into the foreground to right, a spire among trees in the distance to right and mountains in the background; illustration to Scott's edition of Somerville's 'Memorie of the Somervilles ...'. 1815
Print made by: Richard Rhodes

memoryArtifacts.headline: Lady Janet Mowat (Somerville)

zh.lifeSummary: 當Johanna Janet Mowat於大約1397年出生在英國蘇格蘭藍納可爾斯同豪斯時，她的父親John Mowat33歲，母親Jean Nicholson22歲。她於1417年7月10日與William de Somerville 2nd Lord Sommerville在蘇格蘭哈丁頓史爾海利斯 卡素結婚。他們至少是4個兒子和11個女兒的父母。她去世於1458年在蘇格蘭藍納可爾卡瓦斯享年62歲，埋葬在蘇格蘭藍納可爾卡瓦斯。

zh-hans.lifeSummary: 当Johanna Janet Mowat于大约1397年出生在英国苏格兰藍納可爾斯同豪斯时，她的父亲John Mowat33岁，母亲Jean Nicholson22岁。她于1417年7月10日与William de Somerville 2nd Lord Sommerville在苏格兰哈丁頓史爾海利斯 卡素结婚。他们至少是4个儿子和11个女儿的父母。她去世于1458年在苏格兰藍納可爾卡瓦斯享年62岁，埋葬在苏格兰藍納可爾卡瓦斯。

nameMeanings.name: Mowat
nameMeanings.attribution: Dictionary of American Family Names © Patrick Hanks 2003, 2006.
meanings: Scottish (Caithness and Orkney): variant of   Mowatt  .

variants.name: Mowatt
meanings: Scottish (northeastern): habitational name from Mold (Flintshire), see Maude 1. The distinctive Scottish form of the name has arisen from a shift of stress in Mohaut from the second to the first syllable. In Caithness and Orkney, the surname is traditionally pronounced ‘Mode’.

nameMeanings.name: Johanna
nameMeanings.attribution: Dictionary of First Names © Patrick Hanks and Flavia Hodges 1990, 2003, 2006.

variants.name: Jane
meanings: Originally a feminine form of John , from the Old French form Je(h)anne. Since the 17th century it has proved the most popular of the feminine forms of John, ahead of Joan and Jean . It now also commonly occurs as the second element in combinations such as Sarah-Jane. In Britain it is still one of the most frequent of all girls' names. It is not a royal name, but was borne by the tragic Lady Jane Grey ( 1537–54 ), who was unwillingly proclaimed queen in 1553 , deposed nine days later, and executed the following year. Seventy years earlier, the name had come into prominence as that of Jane Shore , mistress of King Edward IV and subsequently of Thomas Grey , 1st Marquess of Dorset, Lady Jane's grandfather. Jane Shore's tribulations in 1483 at the hands of Richard III , Edward's brother and successor, became the subject of popular ballads and plays, which may well have increased the currency of the name in the 16th century. A 19th-century influence was its use as the name of the central character in Charlotte Brontë's novel Jane Eyre ( 1847 ). From 1932 to 1959 it was used as the name of a cheerful and scantily clad beauty whose adventures were chronicled in a strip cartoon in the Daily Mirror. It is also borne by the American film stars Jane Russell ( 1921–2011 ) and Jane Fonda ( b. 1937 ).

nameMeanings.name: Janet
nameMeanings.attribution: Dictionary of First Names © Patrick Hanks and Flavia Hodges 1990, 2003, 2006.
meanings: Originally a diminutive of   Jane  , already in common use in the Middle English period. It remained in use in Scotland and in some parts of England well into the 17th century and was revived at the end of the 19th century to much more widespread use, while still retaining its popularity in Scotland. Since the 1960s, however, it has rather gone out of fashion in Britain.

variants.name: Jannet
meanings: Originally a diminutive of   Jane  , already in common use in the Middle English period. It remained in use in Scotland and in some parts of England well into the 17th century and was revived at the end of the 19th century to much more widespread use, while still retaining its popularity in Scotland. Since the 1960s, however, it has rather gone out of fashion in Britain.

en.lifeSummary: When Johanna Janet Mowat was born about 1397, in Stonehouse, Lanarkshire, Scotland, United Kingdom, her father, John Mowat, was 33 and her mother, Jean Nicholson, was 22. She married William de Somerville 2nd Lord Sommerville on 10 July 1417, in Hailes Castle, Haddingtonshire, Scotland. They were the parents of at least 4 sons and 11 daughters. She died in 1458, in Carnwath, Lanarkshire, Scotland, at the age of 62, and was buried in Carnwath, Lanarkshire, Scotland.

fr.lifeSummary: Lorsque Johanna Janet Mowat est née environ 1397, à Stonehouse, Lanarkshire, Écosse, Royaume-Uni, son père, John Mowat, avait 33 ans et sa mère, Jean Nicholson, avait 22 ans. Elle a épousé William de Somerville 2nd Lord Sommerville le 10 juillet 1417, à Hailes Castle, Haddingtonshire, Écosse. Ils ont eu au moins 4 fils et 11 filles. Elle est décédée en 1458, à Carnwath, Lanarkshire, Écosse, à l’âge de 62 ans, et a été enterrée à Carnwath, Lanarkshire, Écosse.

de.lifeSummary: Als Johanna Janet Mowat um 1397 in Stonehouse, Lanarkshire, Schottland, United Kingdom geboren wurde, war ihr Vater John Mowat 33 und ihre Mutter Jean Nicholson 22. Sie hat am 10. Juli 1417 in Hailes Castle, Haddingtonshire, Scotland William de Somerville 2nd Lord Sommerville geheiratet. Sie hatten mindestens 4 Söhne und 11 Töchter. Sie starb 1458 im Alter von 62 Jahren in Carnwath, Lanarkshire, Scotland und wurde in Carnwath, Lanarkshire, Scotland begraben.

it.lifeSummary: Quando Johanna Janet Mowat è nata il circa 1397 nel Stonehouse, Lanarkshire, Scozia, Regno Unito, sua padre, John Mowat, aveva 33 anni e sua madre, Jean Nicholson, aveva 22 anni. Lei sposato William de Somerville 2nd Lord Sommerville il 10 luglio 1417, nel Hailes Castle, Haddingtonshire, Scotland. Erano genitori di almeno 4 figli e 11 figlie. Morì nel 1458, nel Carnwath, Lanarkshire, Scotland, all'età di 62 anni, e fu sepolta a Carnwath, Lanarkshire, Scotland.

ja.lifeSummary: Johanna Janet Mowatが約1397年にイギリススコットランドラナルクシュアイアストーネハウゼで生まれた時，父John Mowatは33歳，母Jean Nicholsonは22歳であった。1417年7月10日にスコットランドハッドイントンシュアイアヘイレス カストルでWilliam de Somerville 2nd Lord Sommervilleと結婚した。彼らは少なくとも4人の息子と11人の娘の親であった。彼女は1458年にスコットランドラナルクシュアイアカーンワスで62歳で死去し，スコットランドラナルクシュアイアカーンワスにて埋葬された。

ko.lifeSummary: Johanna Janet Mowat(이)가 대략 1397년 영국 스코틀랜드 랜아르크실르 스톤하스에서 태어났을 때, 그녀의 아버지 John Mowat(은)는 33세였고, 그녀의 어머니 Jean Nicholson(은)는 22세였다. 그녀는 1417년 7월 10일 스컷랜드 하딩토실르 하일레스 카스틀에서 William de Somerville 2nd Lord Sommerville(와)과 결혼했다. 그들은 적어도 네 명의 아들과 열 명 이상의 딸을 두었다. 그녀는 1458년 스컷랜드 랜아르크실르 카른왓h에서 62세의 나이로 사망했으며 스컷랜드 랜아르크실르 카른왓h에 묻혔다.

pt.lifeSummary: Quando Johanna Janet Mowat nasceu aproximadamente 1397, em Stonehouse, Lanarkshire, Escócia, United Kingdom, seu pai, John Mowat, tinha 33 anos e sua mãe, Jean Nicholson, tinha 22 anos. Ela casou-se com William de Somerville 2nd Lord Sommerville em 10 de julho de 1417, em Hailes Castle, Haddingtonshire, Scotland. Eles tiveram pelo menos 4 filhos e 11 filhas. Ela faleceu em 1458, em Carnwath, Lanarkshire, Scotland, com 62 anos, e foi sepultada em Carnwath, Lanarkshire, Scotland.

ru.lifeSummary: Когда Johanna Janet Mowat родилась около 1397 г. в местности стоунэоус, ланаркшир, Шотландия, Великобритания, её отцу по имени John Mowat было 33 года, а матери, которую звали Jean Nicholson, 22. Она вышла замуж за человека по имени William de Somerville 2nd Lord Sommerville 10 июля 1417 г. в местности хеилесь кастл, хаддингтоншир, Шотландия. У них было по крайней мере 4 сына и 11 дочерей. Она умерла в 1458 г. в местности карнват, ланаркшир, Шотландия в возрасте 62 лет и была похоронена в местности карнват, ланаркшир, Шотландия.

es.lifeSummary: Cuando Johanna Janet Mowat nació aproximadamente 1397, en Stonehouse, Lanarkshire, Escocia, Reino Unido, su papá, John Mowat, tenía 33 años y su mamá, Jean Nicholson, tenía 22 años. Se casó con William de Somerville 2nd Lord Sommerville el 10 de julio de 1417, en Hailes Castle, Haddingtonshire, Scotland. Fueron padres de por lo menos 4 hijos y 11 hijas. Murió en 1458, en Carnwath, Lanarkshire, Scotland, a la edad de 62 años, y fue sepultada en Carnwath, Lanarkshire, Scotland.
